root_cause: client/src/components/CommandGrid.test.tsx was added to client/src/ without being excluded from client/tsconfig.json. The tsconfig includes all of src/, so tsc compiled the test file during `cd client && npm run build`, failing on missing @testing-library/react types and jest-dom matchers.
prevention_rule: Before adding any .test.tsx or .test.ts file inside client/src/, ensure client/tsconfig.json has exclude globs for test files. The canonical fix: add `"exclude": ["src/**/*.test.ts", "src/**/*.test.tsx", "src/**/*.spec.ts", "src/**/*.spec.tsx"]` to client/tsconfig.json.
